commit_scope: Consolidate three left-behind branches into one current-main proof branch: mesh-command design (#3606), Socratic inquiry KB (#3613), and literal-gap-symbol wellness resolution (#3664).

local_validation.summary: Prompt guide passed before consolidation. Mesh-command and Socratic branch conflicts were resolved in their current index files. Literal-gap generated-index conflicts were resolved by regenerating repository indexes. Focused regression tests passed: 40 passed, 5 existing warnings.

commands: GitHub Actions after this consolidation branch is pushed
ci_validation.summary: Original PR checks were green for #3606, #3613, and #3664 before consolidation; this combined branch still needs its own PR checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public runtime endpoint changed in this branch; deploy validation remains pending until PR merge/deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; CI, review, merge, and deploy proof remain pending on the consolidation PR.

evidence_refs: PR #3606 mesh-command-design had a single current-main conflict in docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md and was consolidated by keeping current mesh rows plus the final mesh-command row.
PR #3613 socratic-method-learning had a single current-main conflict in docs/vision-kb/INDEX.md and was consolidated by keeping current KB rows plus lc-socratic-inquiry.
PR #3664 literal-gap-symbols had generated-index conflicts and was consolidated by running python3 scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py on current main.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Three left-behind branches are represented in one current-main PR instead of staying split across conflicted/draft branches.
test_flows: Focused wellness symbol regression test suite passed.
